utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Required items in format: 5 (health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget). All 5 items appear in the final plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan includes physical and mental sections with plan names and monthly costs, plus total_monthly. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan name and total_monthly provided; however, lacks explicit separation of home vs contents or itemized costs, but the format only asked for 'home/contents insurance with costs'—a combined plan with total cost satisfies the requirement. Considered fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Includes plan options with monthly costs and a total_monthly. Fully specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Provided two services with pricing (monthly and one-time). Fully specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided monthly total and one-time fee, but no annual figure. The format asks for monthly/annual; annual is missing. Therefore, this item is not fully specified.
Thus, 4 of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify each plan mentioned in the final coverage plan and match to the exact item names in the ground-truth ratings. Health coverage includes PrimeCare Premium Plan and HealthFirst Standard Plan for both physical and mental health; ratings are in primary_health_coverage.physical_health and primary_health_coverage.mental_health. Property coverage selects PrimeHome Premium Coverage from property_protection.home_content. Travel coverage includes PrimeTravel Premium Plan and TravelFirst Standard Plan from mobility_coverage.travel_insurance. Additional services include Premium Insurance Membership and Insurance Portfolio Management from general_services.
